response.justification: Candidate has 20+ years of broad software experience but C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2007-2008. The current skill set centers on TypeScript/Node.js/DLang with no recent C++, no MQTT, no IEC 62443/SDL, and no industrial automation background. The role requires a hands-on C++ architect with secure-coding and industrial-protocol depth, which the resume does not demonstrate.
strengths: Long tenure and senior-level experience across full stack and distributed systems
Some low-latency, high-throughput service work (Sociomantic) and event-driven platform design
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops
concerns: Essentially no recent C++/STL experience — primary languages are TypeScript and DLang
No evidence of MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 62443, or industrial automation domain
Missing secure-development-lifecycle and industrial-cybersecurity background required by the role

key_factors.factor: General senior engineering and architecture experience
